title: The Immigration Playbook: Visa prep for the world’s biggest sporting stages | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## The Immigration Playbook: Visa prep for the world’s biggest sporting stages

#### Cvent // September 16, 2025 1-2 p.m. CT
Mega international sporting events like the FIFA World Cup set the stage for more than just athletic excellence—they also require a world-class effort behind the scenes and before kickoff to move athletes, coaches, media, sponsors and fans across borders. From entry requirements to last-minute logistics, getting the right people to the right place with the right documentation takes strategic footwork.
Join this webinar featuring leading sports immigration attorneys who explore how FIFA and other mega-event organizers help teams navigate the complex visa landscape. Whether you’re part of a national team, media network, commercial partner or entertainment, this session will help you stay in bounds when it comes to immigration planning.
Drawing on experience from major international sporting events, our panel will:
- Break down the visa types commonly used for mega-sporting events and who qualifies for each
- Clarify eligibility criteria and application timelines to avoid red cards at the border
- Demystify the visa application and interview process, including key government agencies and contacts
Click below to register for this must-see webinar!
